notes: Per-site trendy_nee_median site classifications (all networks). Column 'trendy_nee_median_bin': existing 7-bin hybrid (unchanged). Column 'trendy_nee_median_bin_30': new 30-bin hybrid added. 30-bin scheme: bin 1 = < 5 gC m-2 yr-1; bins 2–30 = 29 equal-area quantile bins. 29 breakpoints (gC m-2 yr-1): 5.0, 8.6, 12.2, 15.4, 18.3, 21.1, 23.7, 26.1, 28.2, 30.4, 32.5, 34.5, 36.5, 38.6, 40.8, 43.1, 45.5, 48.2, 50.8, 53.5, 56.2, 59.2, 62.4, 65.9, 69.7, 73.8, 78.9, 86.3, 101.3.
